block.l: How many teams do you have? (Minimum 1 team, maximum 4 teams)
Different cells have different points. Answer correctly to earn points!
After you answer the question, the question will disappear
Please keep in mind, click me when there is nothing left, which means all questions were answered

scripts.comment: The purpose of broadcasting [background] is to broadcast a message to the sprite called "background" and hide this sprite to show other things under this "background".

block.l: This Jeopardy have questions in various academic areas

scripts.comment: Broadcast [confetti] to make confetti appear and broadcast [end] to hide confetti.
This is the block used to determine which team is next.

block.l: Would you like to play this game again?(Enter Y or N)
Are you sure to end this game? (Enter Y or N)

scripts.comment: If you cancel to end the game, you will return to the previous team to continue the game.
This reminder is to remind the user that they can end the game by clicking "me".

list.l: Which is a unit of momentum?
Which two hemispheres are separated by the equator?
C. Western Hemisphere and Eastern Hemisphere
Which class support other two classes in the French ancien régime?
The Age of Enlightenment represented a turning point from absolute monarchies to
The rate of Earth's revolution around the Sun is approximately
A box is pushed toward the right across a classroom floor. The force of friction on the box is directed toward the
A plane intersects a sphere. Which two-dimensional shape is formed by this cross section?
The function G(m) represents the amount of gasoline consumed by a car traveling m miles. An appropriate domain for this function would be
A student drops an object from the top of a building which is 19.6 meters from the ground. How long does it take the object to fall to the ground?
As observed from Earth, the wavelengths of light from the most distant galaxies are usually
A. Red shifted due to a contracting universe
B. Red shifted due to an expanding universe
C. Blue shifted due to a contracting universe
When did the Civil Rights Act pass?
Which statement about parallelograms is always true?
A. The diagonals bisect each other

scripts.comment: Every question sprites have almost the same functionality. They set variable [Questions] to different questions. Each question will be sent to sprites A, B, and C, and they will check whether the user's choice is correct.
broadcast [hide] to hide the menu sprite, and let the A, B or C sprites appear to ask questions to prevent the user from clicking on the menu sprite and ending the game while asking the question..
A, B, and C sprites have basically the same function
Four teams have four sprites. Each sprite has the same function. They just for four different teams. The game will switch between four sprites.
If I am clicked, it can end the game
This is the background used to introduce the game
Project Name - Interactive Jeopardy Quiz Start Date: 01/04/2024 End Date: 01/21/24

variable.name: math1
variable.l: Which statement about parallelograms is always true? A. The diagonals are congruent B. The diagonals bisect each other C. The diagonals are perpendicular.

variable.name: Questions
variable.l: Which statement about parallelograms is always true? A. The diagonals bisect each other B. The diagonals are congruent C. The diagonals are perpendicular.
